description: The FileBrowser component is used to show file lists of files on the user's PC in the userspace dash menu.

fields.SelectedItem: The currently selected item being highlighted.
fields.AllowSelect: Whether this file browser allows selecting item elements.
fields.ItemSize: How big the items are on the view.
fields._selectedText: The text to fill with the name of the selected item.
fields._pathRoot: The root of the area being used to display the current path.
fields._buttonsRoot: The root of the area being used to show the different button actions.
fields._folderGrid: The grid layout Component being used to align the folders in the directory.
fields._itemGrid: The grid layout Component being used to align the files in the directory.
fields._tabSprite: The sprite being used to show the tab sprite.
fields._loadingIndicator: The slot that stores the loading indicator for a newly opened directory.
fields._swapper: The component to handle the slide animation when opening a different directory.
fields._user: The user using this file browser.
fields._importButton: The button to import a selected folder or file.
fields._rawImportButton: The button to import a selected file as a raw file object.
fields._createNewButton: The button to create a new file directory.
fields._reloadButton: The button used to refresh the folder and file list.

methods.CreateDirectory: Called when a directory is created.
methods.RunImport: Called when an import needs to be made of a file.
methods.RunRawImport: Called when a raw file import needs to be made of a file.
methods.CreateNew: Called when a new item needs to be made.
methods.Reload: Called when a reload needs to be done.
methods.OnGoUp: Called when the user wants to go up in directories.

usage: Not used directly by the user.

notes.title: CreateHandler
notes.text: Handles creation of directories. Is a sync delegate type.
